excerpt: This release adds support for `version="v3"` in `stream_events` / `astream_events` for `langchain` agents. Refer to the [event streaming](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/event-streaming) guide for details.
summary_hint: This release adds support for `version="v3"` in `stream_events` / `astream_events` for `langchain` agents. Refer to the [event streaming](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/event-streaming) guide for details.
title: langchain-ai/langchain langchain==1.3.0
